entries.sourceBehavior: MainActivity installs the Android splash screen, keeps it visible while SplashViewModel resolves the persisted login flag, then composes navigation with the resolved start destination.
entries.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS replaces the Android splash-screen keep-on-screen lifecycle with EntryAbility startup plus module start-window metadata: EntryAbility resolves the persisted login flag before loading content, then opens the bootstrap page whose initial route state is seeded from that resolved startup decision.
verificationEvidence: Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onCreate reads user_login_state_pref/user_login_state and sets bootstrapStartRoute to onboarding or home_screen before the page content is loaded.

Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onCreate reads the persisted login preference and sets bootstrapStartRoute before entry/src/main/cangjie/app_ability.cj::EntryAbility.onWindowStageCreate loads the page content.

Manual code review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.currentRoute initializes from bootstrapStartRoute so the first rendered page state reflects the resolved startup route.

Manual code/config review: entry/src/main/module.json5::startWindowBackground and entry/src/main/module.json5::startWindowIcon provide the HarmonyOS start-window replacement for the Android splash entry behavior.
Build verification: D:/workspace/Foodike/translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md recorded PASS on 2026-06-25 after the startup bootstrap update.
entries.notes: Platform replacement is intentional for phase 1: HarmonyOS start-window metadata and UIAbility startup replace Android's splash API, while the bootstrap page receives the resolved route before any page content is shown.
